Hindustan Unilever Ltd

Hind. Unilever Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Hindustan Unilever Ltd

₹ 2,201 -0.43%
03 Jul - close price
hul.co.in BSE: 500696 NSE: HINDUNILVR
About

Hindustan Unilever is in the FMCG business comprising primarily of Home Care, Beauty & Personal Care and Foods & Refreshment segments. The Company has manufacturing facilities across the country and sells primarily in India.[1]

Key Points

Business Segments & Brand Portfolio
The company has a portfolio of over 50 brands, spanning 16 FMCG categories, including 19 brands with a turnover of more than Rs. 1,000 Cr PA. [1] The products are split into the following segments:

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 5,17,192 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 2,201
  • High / Low ₹ 2,660 / 2,022
  • Stock P/E 34.0
  • Book Value ₹ 207
  • Dividend Yield 1.86 %
  • ROCE 28.4 %
  • ROE 31.0 %
  • Face Value ₹ 1.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company is almost debt free.
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 92.4%

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 10.6 times its book value
  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 6.51% over past five years.
  • Earnings include an other income of Rs.4,923 Cr.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Scrutinizer''s Report
    30 Jun - 93rd AGM resolutions passed; final dividend ₹22 and interim dividend ₹19 approved on 30 June 2026.
  • Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Outcome of AGM 30 Jun
  • Chairman''s Speech At The 93Rd Annual General Meeting Of The Company
    30 Jun - HUL enclosed Chairman Nitin Paranjpe’s AGM speech delivered on 30 June 2026.
  • Performance Highlights For The Financial Year 2025-26
    17 Jun - HUL created FY2025-26 integrated annual report performance highlights microsite.
  • Closure of Trading Window 12 Jun
